headline: A Look At NiSource (NI) Valuation As Analysts Highlight Data Center Demand And Regulated Growth Potential
summary: Recent analyst coverage of NiSource (NI) has focused on its exposure to rising energy demand from data centers, supportive regulation, and a capex program aimed at quicker recovery of investments and clearer growth visibility. See our latest analysis for NiSource. Analyst optimism around data center demand and regulated growth has arrived alongside a 12.6% 90 day share price return and a 30.4% 1 year total shareholder return, suggesting momentum has been building as investors reassess...
